steps.title: Use the sine period
steps.content:
Sine repeats every $2\pi$. The angle $38\pi$ is a whole number of full rotations.
$$38\pi=19(2\pi)$$

steps.title: Evaluate the terminal value
steps.content: After a whole number of full rotations, the terminal point is back at $(1,0)$. Sine is the $y$-coordinate, so $$\sin(38\pi)=0$$ The answer is A.
